description_long: This is a visibly crushed and deformed aluminum can of Cherry Coca-Cola, featuring a predominantly magenta-red exterior with white branding and nutritional information. The can is cylindrical but heavily dented and misshapen, with the top and bottom rims still intact but the body showing multiple creases and folds. The surface displays various printed elements, including the Coca-Cola logo, flavor designation, recycling information, and a QR code. The top of the can has a standard pull-tab opening, which appears to be closed, and the can is empty as indicated by its collapsed form. The exterior is glossy and metallic, with some areas reflecting light, and the label is printed directly onto the metal. The can's overall appearance suggests it has been discarded and subjected to significant force, typical of litter found in urban environments.
description: A crushed, magenta-red Cherry Coca-Cola aluminum can with white branding and visible dents, typical of urban litter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola script, Cherry flavor label, and nutritional information on a crumpled magenta background.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the QR code, recycling label, and more pronounced creases and dents on the can's surface.
description_view_2: Side view with partial Coca-Cola branding and visible deformation, emphasizing the can's collapsed state.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the 'Cherry' label, Coca-Cola logo, and additional nutritional icons, with heavy crumpling.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola logo, 'Cherry' flavor text, nutritional icons, QR code, recycling label, and multipack warning printed on a magenta background.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Heavily crushed and dented with multiple creases and folds throughout the can body.
